data.content: Shipment complete. Merged feature branch knots-8a97-parent-child-order to main (e7d7f2e30508, 3bf936cf038c). Fixed a pre-existing time-sensitive test flake in apply_tests_invariant.rs (02f94904d306) that was blocking the pre-push hook. All 504 tests pass, 95.49% coverage. Pushed to remote, CI green.
